title: mount: allow mount only when using vfs
body:
when using a driver different than vfs, the mount is probably in a
different mount namespace thus not accessible from the host.  Avoid
the confusion by not allowing mount when a different driver is used.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1964

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM and happy green test buttons.

(Would really love a way of getting stuff into/out of rootless containers, but we can do that later)
/lgtm

```

$ buildah unshare
# buildah mount fedora-working-container

[root@unused libpod]# exit
```

So it can be done, but not intuitive.
seems like the lgtm command wasn't accepted
